executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: added 5 trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets (SCN-020-001 and SCN-020-002 in Scope 1; SCN-020-006 in Scope 2; SCN-020-013 and SCN-020-014 in Scope 3) to specs/020-security-hardening/scopes.md with raw go test / pytest output and source-file pointers; generated specs/020-security-hardening/scenario-manifest.json covering all 18 SCN-020-* scenarios; inserted in-process proxy Test Plan rows at the top of Scope 1 mapping SCN-020-001..004 to internal/config/docker_security_test.go::TestDockerCompose_AllPortsBindLocalhost and TestDockerCompose_NATSUsesConfigFile; appended BUG-020-001 cross-reference section to specs/020-security-hardening/report.md referencing internal/config/docker_security_test.go, internal/auth/oauth_test.go, ml/tests/test_auth.py, and cmd/core/main_test.go. No production code changed.

Underlying behavior tests for SCN-020-001/002/006/013/014 all PASS: `go test -count=1 -v -run 'TestDockerCompose_AllPortsBindLocalhost$|TestDockerCompose_NATSUsesConfigFile$' ./internal/config/` exit 0 (2/2 PASS); `go test -count=1 -v -run 'TestTokenStore_Decrypt_FailClosed_*|TestTokenStore_Decrypt_NoKey_PlaintextPassthrough$|TestTokenStore_Decrypt_WrongKey_FailClosed$' ./internal/auth/` exit 0 (5/5 PASS); `pytest ml/tests/test_auth.py::TestMLSidecarAuthWithToken::test_accept_bearer_token ml/tests/test_auth.py::TestMLSidecarAuthWithToken::test_accept_x_auth_token_header -v` exit 0 (2/2 PASSED). Output recorded inline in scopes.md DoD evidence and report.md > Test Evidence.

Traceability guard PASS: `bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/020-security-hardening` returns RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings) with 18/18 scenarios mapped to DoD and full concrete test file + report evidence coverage. Pre-fix baseline was RESULT: FAILED (14 failures, 5 unmapped scenarios). Output recorded inline in report.md > Validation Evidence.

Artifact lint PASS for both parent (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/020-security-hardening`) and bug folder (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/020-security-hardening/bugs/BUG-020-001-dod-scenario-fidelity-gap`). git diff --name-only confirms boundary: zero changes under internal/, cmd/, ml/, config/, tests/. All edits confined to specs/020-security-hardening/* and the bug folder.
